summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of KED (Kutch Entrepreneur Divas) showcase app. All major functionality working correctly including navigation, marketplace, services, mobile responsiveness, and page transitions.

design_issues.issue: Login/Signup toggle not clearly visible or implemented differently than expected

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all required sections (hero, trust strip, featured businesses, products, services, spotlight, workshops, testimonials)
Navigation works correctly - all menu links navigate to proper pages
Marketplace page displays product cards with search and category filters
Services page shows service cards with type filters and detail page navigation
Product detail page loads correctly when clicking product cards
Service detail page loads correctly when clicking service cards
Language toggle button exists and dropdown works
Mobile navigation works - menu toggle and bottom navigation visible
Seller onboarding page has multi-step form with progress indicators
Bulk Orders page loads with categories and inquiry form
Page transition animations work between routes
